title: Add design-first flow for UI tasks in execution pipeline
description: Add a visual-design phase to the execution pipeline that spawns Quinn (designer) before the build phase for UI tasks. Includes detection heuristic, builder acceptance gate, CEO escalation, and doc updates.

scope.in: Modify 09-execute-projects.md, phase-definitions.md, and casting-rules.md to add design-first flow for UI tasks.
scope.out: New tooling, schema files, or changes to non-pipeline docs.

dod.criterion: New 'visual-design' phase section exists in 09-execute-projects.md between 'design' and 'build' phases
Phase spawns Quinn (UI/UX designer) with task scope + prior artifacts to produce visual-design.md
Detection heuristic defined: triggers when browser_test=true OR category is game/dashboard OR agent includes frontend engineer and task touches UI files
Builder acceptance gate defined: builder reviews design, accepts or objects with reasons
CEO escalation path defined: when builder objects, both design and objections shown to CEO who decides

tasks.title: Update builder prompt to reference visual-design artifact

dod.criterion: Builder/engineer agent spawn section in 09-execute-projects.md references visual-design.md artifact when present
Builder gets instruction to follow the design spec and report deviations (similar to brainstorm_alignment)
phase-definitions.md lists 'visual-design' as a composable phase with description
Common phase patterns in phase-definitions.md include visual-design for UI work (e.g. ['visual-design', 'build', 'code-review', 'review'])
casting-rules.md notes Quinn's pre-build design role for UI tasks
